plot.noStoryHint: Without a story, suggestions use appearance and current costume only.
plot.noScenesYet: No scenes linked to this story yet
plot.pickerHint: Pick a story, then a scene or dialogue beat. Preview shows the plot context used for suggestions.

costumes.title: Costumes
costumes.subtitle: Global wardrobe looks attached to characters — suggest from plot segments
costumes.empty: No wardrobe looks yet. Create one here or on a character.
costumes.imageHint: Card cover; generate via costume swap or upload (same idea as character refs).
costumes.editorHint: Looks are stored on the selected character’s costume library
costumes.appliedActive: Applied as the character’s active costume
costumes.suggestPreview: Suggestion filled in (segment: {{segment}}) — review, then save
costumes.cannotDeleteActive: In use by: {{names}}. Change their active costume first.
costumes.cannotDeleteOrphan: This is the character’s current text costume (not in the wardrobe library). Edit the character to change it.
costumes.subtitleGlobal: Global wardrobe — free-standing looks, link zero or many characters
costumes.editorHintGlobal: Costumes are independent; link characters optionally. Dress-gen needs a character reference image.
costumes.linkedCharactersHint: Optional. Leave empty for a standalone wardrobe item, or pick several characters who can wear it.
costumes.aiHint: Enter an idea, or leave blank to polish the current description. Writes name and full wardrobe text.
costumes.aiIdeaPlaceholder: e.g. rain-night rider jacket, winter school uniform…
costumes.aiFillOk: AI filled the costume. Review, then save.
costumes.aiNeedIdea: Enter an idea, or fill name/description to polish.
costumes.emptyGlobal: No costumes yet. Create a look — you can link characters later.
costumes.generateDressedHint: Pick a character base still and pose package; generate an identity-locked dressed image from this look description.
costumes.saveFirstForDress: Save the costume first, then generate a dressed look.
costumes.introVideoOk: Costume intro video ready. Press “Play intro video” to watch in the app.
costumes.dressedOk: Dressed look added to the character gallery
costumes.globalForCharacterHint: Global costumes linked to this character. Generate dressed looks with this character’s reference image.
costumes.saveCharacterFirst: Save the character first to link global costumes.
costumes.aiNeedIdeaOrImage: Add an idea, fill draft fields, or upload a reference still first.
costumes.aiFillFromImage: Reading the reference still to fill the profile…
costumes.aiHintWithImage: Type an idea, or leave blank and use the selected / cover still only — AI will fill fields from the photo.
costumes.aiUsingImage: Using the selected (or cover) still for vision fill.
costumes.linksHint: Characters who may wear this look. Link/unlink instantly — no need to hit Save.
costumes.linksSaveFirst: Save the look first, then link characters.
costumes.baseNoImages: This character has no usable stills. Generate a body plate or full-body sheet first.
costumes.dressNotePh: e.g. coat open, wet rain sheen, long train…
costumes.preferLinkedChars: Prefer characters linked on the Links tab; all characters shown if none linked.
costumes.baseStripHint: Tap a still for the identity base (prefer body plate / full front).
costumes.dressNeedCharBase: Pick a character and a base still first.
costumes.dressNeedDesc: Add a costume description on the Profile tab first.

audit.title: Activity log
audit.subtitle: Track exports, generation, errors, and system events for support and debugging
audit.confirmClear: Clear the entire activity log? This cannot be undone.
audit.empty: Use the app normally — generation, export, and settings changes appear here automatically.
audit.selectRowHint: Click any row on the left to see full details and copy JSON for support.

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
common.galleryReorderHint: Drag thumbnails, or select and use ← → (save to persist)
common.useIdentityRefHint: When on, generation uses the stills selected in the gallery list (multi-select). Full profile fields are included in the prompt. Turn off for a pure text/style generate.
common.aiNeedIdeaOrImage: Add an idea, fill draft fields, or upload a reference still first.
common.aiFillFromImage: Reading the reference still to fill the profile…
common.aiHintWithImage: Type an idea, or leave blank and use the selected / cover still only — AI will fill fields from the photo.
common.aiUsingImage: Using the selected (or cover) still for vision fill.
common.imageGenConfirmHint: Review or edit the prompt, then generate.
common.imageGenConfirmPure: No identity lock — generate from profile and style only.
common.galleryMultiSelectHint: Click thumbnails to multi-select. With identity lock, selected stills guide generation.
common.imageGenConfirmPromptNote: Technical prompt for the image model (English). Edit carefully; keep identity and medium instructions.
common.hardRulesHint: Must / must-not constraints for every image and video from this asset. Higher priority than other prompts.
common.hardRulesPh:
【必須】exactly two hands, two feet
【禁止】extra limbs; wires; watermarks; unrelated objects
common.hardRulesMissingInPrompt: No hard rules in this prompt. Fill「生成鐵則」on the profile tab and save, then generate again.

media.noIntroVideo: No intro video for this still
media.fileMissing: Image file is missing or was moved
media.zoomHint: Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · Esc to close · +/−/0 keyboard shortcuts
media.introPlayError: Could not play the intro video. Restart the app and try again, or use “Open intro video”.

stories.title: Story management
stories.subtitle: Create and manage multiple independent short dramas
stories.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Last Stop on the School Bus
stories.statusHint: Set progress manually; batch generation also updates this automatically.
stories.coverHint: Poster for the library card; AI generate or upload (same flow as character covers).
stories.noStories: No stories yet. Click “New story” to begin.
stories.exportBackupConfirm: This backup includes only the current story (script, timeline, and bound media). It does not include the global character, scene, or prop libraries, or app settings. For a full backup of everything, use File → Export all app data.
stories.step1: Create a new story (or import a backup)
stories.step2: Add characters, scenes, and props for this story
stories.step3: Generate or export on the timeline (color placeholders are used without a gateway)
stories.prototypeNote: The MVP scaffold is ready; commercial-grade film quality is still under development.
stories.styleNotePlaceholder: e.g., afternoon gold light, handheld camera, warm grade…
stories.metaHint: Save basics, then link cast and write dialogue beats.
stories.castHint: Browse by tab with search and linked/unlinked filters; pagination for large libraries.
stories.castEmptyChars: Character library is empty — create characters first.
stories.castEmptyScenes: Scene library is empty — create scenes first.
stories.castEmptyProps: Prop library is empty — create props first.
stories.castCostumeNone: No wardrobe looks linked to this character yet. Link costumes in the wardrobe library first.
stories.scriptHint: Each beat can assign character, scene, prop, and dialogue. Beats write to the timeline and power “suggest from plot” segments.
stories.noBeats: No beats yet. Add a beat to start writing dialogue.
stories.castEmptyHint: Link cast on the Cast tab first
stories.beatDialoguePh: What they say or do in this beat…
stories.beatScriptHint: One short clip: multiple spoken lines, action, expression, tone, mood, atmosphere, camera, sfx. Use [DIALOGUE|Name] for speech; [ACTION|Name] for business. TTS/subtitles use spoken lines only.
stories.beatNoSpoken: No spoken lines yet (action-only is OK)
stories.aiQuickHint: Enter an idea (or title only) to generate a style bible; or generate script beats after linking cast/scenes.
stories.aiIdeaPlaceholder: e.g., a late apology between two generations, warm realism…
stories.aiScriptHint: Writes 4–8 full clip screenplays (action, expression, mood, multi-line dialogue) from title, style, and linked cast/scenes/props.
stories.aiMetaOk: Style note filled — edit if needed, then save.
stories.aiScriptOk: Generated {{n}} beats and wrote them to the timeline.
stories.aiNeedTitle: Enter a story title or idea first.
stories.aiNeedSave: Save the story before generating beats.
stories.aiNeedCast: Link at least one character or scene under Cast first.
stories.aiReplaceBeatsConfirm: This will replace existing script beats. Continue?
stories.castEmptyActions: No actions in the library yet.

characters.title: Characters
characters.subtitle: Global character library — stories select shared cast
characters.editorHint: Multiple reference images improve video consistency; file paths are not shown
characters.galleryReorderHint: Drag thumbnails, or select and use ← → (save character to persist)
characters.galleryZoomHint: Hover for a light zoom; use Zoom or double-click for fullscreen pan and zoom
characters.noPhotos: No images yet — generate a sheet or upload one
characters.coverHint: Cover is the library card image. Select a thumbnail, then Set as cover, and save the character.
characters.name: Name
characters.appearancePlaceholder: Head/face (or equivalent), body plan, colors, distinctive marks… (non-human OK)
characters.spokenLanguagesHint: {{n}} selected (multi-select; search by code or name)
characters.spokenLanguagesSearch: Search languages (e.g. Cantonese, yue, English, ja)…
characters.importHint: Supports soulmd-hub and local Markdown files
characters.soulEmpty: No soul linked yet. Click a catalog entry on the left to preview full text, then Use — or import a local soul.md.
characters.soulEditorHint: Same as the Soul catalog: search, page, pick, and read the full document on the right.
characters.soulCatalogEmpty: No items. Search or refresh to load the public catalog.
characters.generateSoulHint: Uses the profile fields above to write a full soul.md via AI; shows on the right.
characters.generateSoulNeedProfile: Fill name or appearance / personality first, then generate Soul.
characters.generateSoulOk: Soul generated: {{title}} (review full text on the right, then save the character)
characters.soulHubHint: Public souls from soulmd-hub.ysk.hk (50-page index for quick suggestions)
characters.aiCreateHint: Enter a short idea; the master prompt fills appearance, voice, mannerisms, and related fields.
characters.aiImproveHint: Describe what to change (for example, more weathered, deeper voice). Leave blank to polish all fields. Works for new and existing characters.
characters.improvePlaceholder: e.g., stronger mannerisms, quieter voice, more period costume… (optional)
characters.ideaPlaceholder: e.g., A gentle piano teacher — or a talking black cat spirit…
characters.ideaRequired: Enter an idea, or fill some fields first and then improve
characters.aiFillOk: AI filled the character. Review, then save.
characters.aiImproveOk: AI improved the character. Review, then save.
characters.sheetVariantHint: Costume-swap pipeline: body plate (skin-tone unitard) → base layer → full costume. Identity lock fixes the face. Fewer panels are more stable. Body plates are hidden when age suggests a minor. Grok blocks true unclothed images — body plates use a form-fit unitard.
characters.sheetVariantHintShort: Pipeline: body plate → base layer → costume. Fewer panels are more stable.
characters.sheetHintShort: Requires Gateway imagesApi. New sheets append; pure layout by default.
characters.useIdentityRefHintShort: When on, locks face via image edit. Package changes and body/base/bare plates always pure-generate so the old sheet is not cloned.
characters.swapCostumeHintShort: Edit from body plate or base layer; keep face and proportions.
characters.costumeLibHintShort: Save named looks; apply then run costume swap.
characters.aiCreateHintShort: Describe an idea; fill profile fields in one step.
characters.aiImproveHintShort: Optional direction, or leave empty to polish all fields.
characters.sheetHint: Requires Gateway imagesApi. Grok Imagine is natively about 720p–1K; optional 2× upscale. Professional packages use identity locks and fixed camera language for stability. Existing photos: selected/newest is the identity ref (cap 1). New sheets append.
characters.sheetOkWithRef: Generated using the previous photo as a reference
characters.saveFirstForSheet: Save the character before generating a sheet
characters.artStyleHint: Photoreal, 3D, anime, and more — injected into the image prompt. Choose style separately from sheet package. Lock style before multi-angle sheets.
characters.sheetBareBodyWarning: This package requests a half-nude or full-nude anatomical body plate. It requires image-AI / Gateway support and may be refused by content policy. Upper half-nude = bare torso with simple bottoms; lower half-nude = bare legs with a simple top; full-nude = fully garment-free. For lawful adult costume-design and production only — not minors, not pornography, not immoral use. Your choice; you are responsible.
characters.forcePureGenHint: Body / base / half-nude / full-nude packages always use a fresh generate (no image edit) so the selected sheet is not cloned. Confirm the new image in the draft dialog.
characters.swapCostumeHint: Edit a body nude or base-layer sheet into a new outer wardrobe while locking face and proportions. Generate a body or base-layer package first. Nude bases are never used when age suggests a minor.
characters.swapCostumePlaceholder: e.g. black leather jacket, red scarf, combat boots; or teal xianxia robes with a jade sash…
characters.swapCostumeNoBase: No base image yet. Generate a body nude, base-layer, or full-body sheet first.
characters.costumeLibHint: Save multiple named looks for one character. Apply a look, then run costume swap. Saved with the character.
characters.costumeLibEmpty: No named looks yet. Add from the costume description above, or suggest from plot.
characters.suggestWardrobeOk: Plot wardrobe suggestion applied — review, then save
characters.suggestNeedName: Enter a character name before suggesting wardrobe
characters.useIdentityRefHint: Off by default: generate and re-generate follow the sheet package layout. On: lock face from the selection (layout may still be constrained). Turn off when changing packages.
characters.introVideoOk: Intro video ready. Press “Play intro video” to watch in the app.
characters.externalRefHint: Import photos from disk. When enabled below, AI image generation can lock identity to these stills.
characters.externalRefEmpty: No external refs yet. Add a photo to guide face / look.
characters.useExternalRef: Use external ref for AI generate
characters.useExternalRefHint: On: image edit from your external still (same face). Off: invent a new look from the profile only.
characters.soulEditPlaceholder: Paste or edit soul.md here — full character bible in markdown…
characters.soulEditHint: You can edit freely. Click Save on the character to keep changes (stored as a local soul.md).

scenes.title: Scenes
scenes.subtitle: Global scene library — stories select shared locations
scenes.statusHint: Set progress manually; the filter uses this field. Generation may also update it.
scenes.noScenes: No scenes yet. Write a place idea, expand with AI, then generate an establishing plate.
scenes.editorHint: Lock space identity and establishing plates first, then atmosphere-swap (day/night/rain). Saved scenes feed the timeline.
scenes.plateHintShort: Empty sets preferred. Requires Gateway imagesApi.
scenes.aiHintShort: Describe an idea or leave empty to polish fields.
scenes.looksHintShort: Named day/night/rain looks for this location.
scenes.noPhotos: No plates yet. Pick a package and generate.
scenes.plateHint: Requires Gateway imagesApi. Prefer empty sets — no hero faces. Existing plates: selected/newest is the edit ref.
scenes.saveFirstForPlate: Save the scene before generating a plate
scenes.introVideoOk: Scene intro video ready. Press “Play intro video” to watch in the app.
scenes.swapAtmosphereHint: Edit establishing or hero plates — change only time, weather, and light while locking architecture.
scenes.atmoPlaceholder: e.g. afternoon sun, dry street; or heavy rain night, neon…
scenes.atmoNoBase: No base plate yet. Generate establishing or hero first.
scenes.looksHint: Save named day/night/rain looks for this location; apply then swap.
scenes.aiHint: Idea or polish existing fields; or suggest a beat from story cast/props.
scenes.aiFillOk: AI filled the scene. Review, then save.
scenes.suggestPlotPickerHint: Pick a story, then optionally a scene or dialogue beat. Generate only after you confirm.
scenes.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. park bench at golden hour, a late apology…
scenes.ideaRequired: Enter an idea, or fill some fields first
scenes.locationKeyPh: e.g. teahouse_alley — same key can copy plates
scenes.locationKeyHint: Use one key for the same physical place across scene numbers to copy galleries.
scenes.copyGalleryHint: Other beats at this location have plates — copy:
scenes.imagesHint: Plate = new camera package; Atmosphere = same place, new time/weather. Shared gallery on the left.
scenes.atmoNeedPlate: Generate or upload a plate first to use as the base.

props.title: Props
props.subtitle: Global prop library — stories select shared props
props.name: Name
props.noProps: No props yet. Write an idea, expand with AI, then generate a hero plate.
props.editorHint: Lock a hero plate first, then detail/scale. Saved props feed the timeline.
props.aiHintShort: Describe an idea; fill prop fields in one step.
props.suggestPlotPickerHint: Pick a story and plot segment; AI fills prop fields from the plot.
props.suggestIdeaFromStory: Suggest a key prop for the selected story and tone.
props.suggestIdeaFromSegment: Suggest a key prop for plot segment {{segment}}.
props.saveFirstForPlate: Save the prop before generating a plate
props.introVideoOk: Prop intro video ready. Press “Play intro video” to watch in the app.
props.aiFillOk: AI filled the prop. Review, then save.
props.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. rusted silver pocket watch with engraving…
props.ideaRequired: Enter an idea or fill some fields first

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Production desk — order clips, preview, generate video, and export. Write script beats in the story editor.
timeline.noEntries: No clips yet. Use story beats, or drag cast assets from the right to add shots.
timeline.libraryHint: Only assets linked to this story. Manage cast in the story editor.
timeline.dragHint: Drag onto the timeline, or click to append the next free slot.
timeline.previewNoMedia: No playable media on this clip
timeline.undoDone: Undone and saved to the database
timeline.redoDone: Redone and saved to the database
timeline.clipDurationHint: Grok allows 6s or 10s only. The timeline above updates immediately; regenerate if media already exists.
timeline.skipEmptyHint: No media on this clip — skipping during play…
timeline.revisionPlaceholder: e.g. only two hands, no extra limbs; keep same costume and set…
timeline.revisionHint: Appended to this clip’s video prompt — not a pixel edit of the old file. Leave empty for a plain re-run.
timeline.castEmptyCharacters: No characters linked to this story yet.
timeline.castEmptyScenes: No scenes linked to this story yet.
timeline.castEmptyProps: No props linked to this story yet.
timeline.pickStoryHint: Choose a story above to edit its timeline.
timeline.exportDeleteConfirm: Delete this exported video from disk? This cannot be undone.
timeline.exportHistoryEmpty: No exports yet. Use “Export final film” — every version will appear here.
timeline.packAbutHint: Place clips end-to-end in order with no gaps; keeps each clip’s duration
timeline.packAbutDone: Clips packed end-to-end with no gaps
timeline.packAbutNeedClips: Need at least two clips to pack
timeline.snapHint: Snap clip edges to the grid and neighbouring clips while dragging

advanced.openHint: Set cast reference images / costumes and batch-generate keyframe stills
advanced.title: Advanced prep
advanced.flowHint: ① Lock cast looks → ② Batch keyframe stills (continuity) → ③ Video from ready stills
advanced.castHint: Pick the reference image and costume look for each cast member. Generate dressed looks on the Characters page first — only looks with images are selectable here.
advanced.castEmpty: No characters bound on the timeline yet.
advanced.pickImageHint: Click a thumbnail to use it for video (saves immediately). ✓ = selected.
advanced.refSelected: Reference image selected for video prep
advanced.costumeNoImage: This look has no image yet — generate a costume swap on Characters first
advanced.galleryEmpty: No gallery images — generate on Characters
advanced.storyboardHint: Each cell is one beat. Batch gen runs in order with continuity lock. When a still is ready you can go straight to video.
advanced.videoNoStillHint: Video exists but no still yet (re-open Advanced to auto-extract)
advanced.removeStillHint: Delete this still so you can re-generate it
advanced.genLockedHint: Generating — each beat depends on the previous; wait until finished
advanced.needStills: Generate at least one still first

timeline.castEmptyActions: No actions linked to this story. Open the story editor → Cast → Actions.
timeline.mergedHardRulesHint: Merged from this story + linked characters / scenes / props / actions. Applied at highest priority on clip generate (revision cannot cancel these).

pipeline.doneStub: Generation finished (includes stub color placeholders, not real AI video).
pipeline.doneFail: Generation failed. Check Settings or the gateway.
pipeline.checkGateway: Use Settings to probe chat and video connectivity.
pipeline.needFfmpeg: FFmpeg not found (bundled or system). Reinstall the app, or set the FFMPEG_PATH environment variable.
pipeline.confirmStub: This will use stub color placeholders (not real AI video). Continue?
pipeline.confirmHttp: This will call Gateway /v1/videos (requires an agent or admin key). Continue?
pipeline.confirmAuto: The app will automatically choose Gateway or stub mode. Continue?
pipeline.exportFallbackConfirm: Some clips are not ready; color fallbacks will be used. Export anyway?
pipeline.clipDoneStub: This is only a purple stub clip (real video API failed or offline). Check the gateway / video channel and re-generate.
pipeline.noFailedClips: There are no failed clips to retry.
pipeline.missingRefConfirm: These characters have no reference image: {{names}}. Continue?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Separate providers for chat, image, and video, plus app preferences
settings.llmTabHint: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions. Prefer Grok local gateway for full image/video. The app starts the gateway automatically when you select it.
settings.imageTabHint: Character, scene, and prop reference images. Inherit chat, or pick Seedream (Ark) / another image API.
settings.videoTabHint: Short-drama clip generation. Inherit chat, Grok gateway, Seedance (Ark), stub, or a custom video API.
settings.exportTabHint: Final encode, subtitles, audio levels, and FFmpeg.
settings.appTabHint: UI language, appearance, and FFmpeg status.
settings.inheritLlmKey: Leave blank to inherit the chat API key
settings.colorSchemeHint: Default follows the system; or force light or dark.
settings.llmSubtitle: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions. Pick a popular provider or custom endpoint. Full image/video pipeline is best with the local Grok gateway.

channelPresetHint.sameAsLlm: Reuse the endpoint and key from the Chat model tab
channelPresetHint.stub: Skip real video APIs and emit placeholder clips (offline / debug)
channelPresetHint.seedance: ByteDance Seedance video · Ark API key · not OpenAI /videos
channelPresetHint.seedream: ByteDance Seedream images · can share Ark key with Seedance

settings.imageModelHint: Seedream endpoint model id from the Ark console (e.g. doubao-seedream-4-0)
settings.videoModelHint: Seedance endpoint model id from the Ark console (e.g. doubao-seedance-1-0-pro)
settings.seedanceBaseHint: China default ark.cn-beijing.volces.com; overseas can use BytePlus ModelArk base.
settings.channelPartialCaps: This provider may lack native image/video APIs. Use only if the endpoint implements OpenAI-compatible /images or /videos.

llmPresetHint.grokGateway: Local :3847 · chat / image / video · gk_live_ key
llmPresetHint.openrouter: Multi-model hub · Claude via this route
llmPresetHint.kimi: Moonshot Kimi · chat / scripts · no native image/video gen · platform.kimi.ai

settings.providerVideoBanner: This provider is primarily for text (profiles / scripts). For short-drama image and video generation, prefer the Grok local gateway.
settings.baseUrlLocked: Official endpoint (read-only). Choose “Custom endpoint” to edit the URL.
settings.llmHintGrok: Recommended: Grok-Cli-to-OpenAI-compatible · gctoac start · gk_live_ key
settings.llmHintOpenAI: Official OpenAI; requires an sk- key; use stub or Grok gateway for video
settings.llmHintCustom: Any OpenAI-compatible base URL (including other local gateways)
settings.apiKeyHint: Create a gk_live_… key in Gateway Admin → Keys, then paste it here
settings.apiKeyHintCustom: Bearer token for your endpoint (optional for local servers)
settings.videoDefaultsHint: Every field has a default; empty or corrupt values are backfilled automatically. Use “Apply video defaults” to reset.
settings.defaultMaxClipSeconds: Default clip length in seconds (Grok supports 6 or 10 only)
settings.defaultMaxClipSecondsHint: Timeline clips snap to 6 or 10 seconds
settings.photoHint: Character sheets use Gateway /v1/images. Grok is natively about 720p–1K; optional 2× enhancement is available. All fields have defaults.
settings.imageEnhance: 2× upscale and mild sharpen after generation
settings.imageEnhanceMaxEdge: Enhance if longest edge is under (px)
settings.ttsEnabled: Try TTS for dialogue on export (optional)
settings.openExportFolder: Reveal export in folder after save
settings.packagedHint: FFmpeg is bundled; media and the database live under userData. Override with FFMPEG_PATH if needed.
settings.updateIdle: No update check has been run yet.
settings.updateHint: Packaged builds check GitHub Releases for installer updates.
settings.updateInstallFail: Cannot install the update (nothing downloaded, or this is not a packaged build).
settings.gatewayHint: Primary LLM: https://github.com/yanshekki/Grok-Cli-to-OpenAI-compatible — gctoac start (:3847). Video requires videoApi and an agent or admin key. See docs/grok-gateway.md
settings.ffmpegRequired: This app requires FFmpeg (bundled or resolved) for cut, export, and placeholder clips. Reinstall the app, or set FFMPEG_PATH to a working ffmpeg binary.
settings.webServerHint: When on, you can open the app in a browser on this machine or LAN (same database and media as desktop).
settings.webServerHostHint: Default: all interfaces so other devices on the LAN can open the browser UI
settings.webServerTokenEmpty: Generated when you enable the server
settings.webServerTokenHint: Paste this token on the browser login page. Do not share it publicly.
settings.webServerNoSpa: SPA not built (npm run build:web). API works; for full UI build first or use desktop.
settings.webServerApiMissing: Web server API is not loaded. Fully quit and restart the app (a page reload is not enough).
settings.gatewayUnavailable: Gateway control is not available in this build
settings.gatewayPackageMissing: Gateway package missing. Reinstall InstantDrama Magician (includes grok-cli-to-openai-compatible).
settings.grokBuildMissingHint: Install the Grok Build CLI (command: grok), then click “Start / check gateway”. The app starts the OpenAI-compatible gateway for you — no manual gctoac start.
settings.openExternalUnavailable: Cannot open external links in this build. URL copied if possible.
settings.gatewayUnhealthy: Admin opened, but gateway health check failed — try Start/Check Gateway first.
settings.gatewayReadyWithKey: Grok Gateway ready (API key configured automatically)
settings.gatewayReadyManaged: Grok Gateway is ready — key and connection are managed automatically.
settings.llmTabHintGrok: Pick Grok — the app checks Grok Build, starts the gateway, and configures access. No API key to paste.
settings.grokSetupCheckingBlurb: Checking Grok Build, starting the local gateway, and preparing access…
settings.grokSetupReadyBlurb: Everything is ready. The app manages the gateway and API key for you.
settings.grokSetupNeedBuildBlurb: Grok Build (the `grok` CLI) is required once. Install it, then recheck.
settings.grokSetupNeedPackageBlurb: Gateway package is missing. Reinstall InstantDrama Magician.
settings.grokSetupUnhealthyBlurb: Gateway is not responding. Recheck to restart and reconfigure.
settings.grokCheckBuildMissing: Not found — install with the command below
settings.grokCheckGatewayWait: Starts automatically after Grok Build is available
settings.grokCheckKeyManaged: Created and stored privately — never shown here
settings.grokInstallHint: Run this in Terminal, then come back and press Recheck. Requires SuperGrok / free trial access as offered by xAI.
settings.grokModelAfterInstall: Models unlock after Grok Build is detected.
settings.modelsFallback: Live model list is busy — showing built-in Grok models. Try again in a moment.
settings.modelsRateLimited: Too many requests. Showing built-in models for now — wait a few seconds.
settings.clearAllConfirm: Reset all settings to defaults? API keys and custom endpoints will be cleared. Your interface language is kept.
settings.updateUpToDate: You are on the latest version
settings.updateDevSkipped: Installers only auto-update in packaged builds (GitHub Releases)
settings.updateDownloadedBanner: Version {{version}} is ready — restart to install
settings.cliUpdateHint: CLI updates use the npm registry: instant-drama update  or  npm install -g instant-drama-magician@latest
settings.updateHintPackaged: Packaged builds check GitHub Releases for installer updates.
settings.updateHintDev: Development mode cannot apply installer updates. Use a packaged build or the CLI (npm).
settings.updateHintWeb: The browser UI does not auto-update. Install the desktop app or CLI.
settings.openReleaseFail: Could not open the Releases page
settings.npmUpdateAvailable: CLI package {{version}} is available on npm
settings.updateWebOnly: Use the desktop app or CLI to update

updateError.network: Network error — check your connection and retry
updateError.feed: Update feed missing — open Releases to download manually

ai.lastStub: The last run used stub placeholders

aiJobs.profileDraftHint: Confirm to apply and save to the character (if it already exists). You may discard instead.
aiJobs.sheetDraftHint: The image is added to the reference gallery only after you confirm.
aiJobs.storyCoverDraftHint: Confirm to set this as the story cover on the list card.
aiJobs.pipelineDraftHint: Video and timeline results are already written to the project; this is a summary only.
aiJobs.startedBackground: Generation started in the background. You may switch pages. Progress appears at the bottom left.
aiJobs.wardrobeDraftHint: Confirm to apply costume, art style, and costume library (then save the character).
aiJobs.sceneProfileDraftHint: Confirm to write scene fields (if the scene already exists). Or discard.
aiJobs.scenePlateDraftHint: Confirm to add this plate to the scene gallery and persist the scene.
aiJobs.propProfileDraftHint: Confirm to write prop fields (if the prop already exists).
aiJobs.propPlateDraftHint: Confirm to add this plate to the prop gallery.
aiJobs.interruptedReload: Page reloaded — the job was interrupted. You can try again.
aiJobs.errImageNoSandbox: Image failed: Gateway returned no image (no_image_in_sandbox). Enable imagesApi in Admin, use an agent/admin key. Body/nude plates are often content-filtered — try base-layer or costume packages, or simplify the character appearance and retry.
aiJobs.errImageApiOff: Image API is off: enable imagesApi in Gateway Admin → API features, then retry.
aiJobs.actionProfileDraftHint: Confirm to write action fields (if the action already exists).
aiJobs.actionPlateDraftHint: Confirm to add this instruction board to the action gallery.

errors.actionNotLinked: Action is not linked to this story.
errors.aiUnavailable: Cannot reach the AI gateway. Make sure Grok / Gateway is running and try again.
errors.apiUnavailable: API is not available. Run Electron (npm run dev) or the web server (npm run start:server).
errors.atmosphereBasePlateRequired: No base plate for atmosphere swap. Generate an establishing or hero plate first.
errors.backupWrongKind: Not a full app-data backup. Use story import for story zips.
errors.beatsMustBeArray: Beats must be a JSON array.
errors.cannotRemoveActionOnTimeline: Cannot remove this action: it is still used on the timeline.
errors.cannotRemoveCharacterOnTimeline: Cannot remove this character: it is still used on the timeline.
errors.cannotRemovePropOnTimeline: Cannot remove this prop: it is still used on the timeline.
errors.cannotRemoveSceneOnTimeline: Cannot remove this scene: it is still used on the timeline.
errors.cannotStartGeneration: Cannot start generation for the current story status.
errors.characterJsonMissingName: Character JSON is missing a name.
errors.characterNotInCast: Character is not in this story cast.
errors.characterNotLinked: Character is not linked to this story.
errors.chatTimeoutHint: Increase chatTimeoutMs or check the Gateway chat queue.
errors.clipDurationTooLong: Clip duration exceeds the AI video limit.
errors.costumeActiveCannotDelete: Costume is active on a character and cannot be deleted.
errors.costumeDescRequired: Costume description is required for costume swap.
errors.costumeNoBaseImage: This character has no usable base image. Generate a character reference sheet first (e.g. bible / full-body), then try dress again.
errors.costumeNotLinkedToCharacter: Costume is not linked to this character.
errors.costumeSwapNoBase: This character has no usable base image. Generate a body, base-layer, or full-body sheet first.
errors.draftNotFound: Draft image not found. Generate again.
errors.endTimeOrder: endTime must be greater than startTime.
errors.ffmpegExportMissing: Export finished but output file missing.
errors.ffmpegNotFound: Bundled FFmpeg not found. Reinstall the app or set FFMPEG_PATH.
errors.ffmpegStillExtractFailed: Could not extract still frame from video.
errors.gctoacNotFound: gctoac (Grok Gateway CLI) was not found.
errors.grokCliFailed: Grok CLI failed while handling the request.
errors.grokCliFailedHint: Often vision or a large still. Check that Grok Gateway is running (gctoac start), re-import a smaller image, and retry. See docs/grok-gateway.md.
errors.headlessPickFile: Headless mode: no file open dialog. Pass an absolute path, or set IDM_PICK_FILE.
errors.headlessSavePath: Headless mode: no save dialog. Set IDM_SAVE_PATH or pass a destination path.
errors.ideaOrDraftRequired: Enter an idea, or fill some fields first.
errors.ideaOrImageRequired: Add an idea, draft fields, or a reference still first.
errors.imageApiDisabled: Image API is disabled on the gateway.
errors.imageApiDisabledHint: Enable imagesApi in Gateway Admin → API features, then retry.
errors.imageApiNoB64: Image API returned no image data.
errors.imageNoSandbox: Image generation returned no image file.
errors.imageNoSandboxHint: Enable imagesApi in Gateway Admin; use an agent/admin key. Body plates are often filtered — try undergarment or costume packages first.
errors.importZipPathRequired: Import requires a zip path (CLI: pass the path as the first argument).
errors.invalidSoulUrl: URL must start with http:// or https://.
errors.keyNotAllowed: Key not allowed for this action.
errors.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters.
errors.networkFailed: Network request failed. Check that the app server and AI gateway are running, then retry.
errors.noBeatsInResponse: No beats found in the AI response.
errors.noJsonInModelResponse: No JSON object found in the model response.
errors.openUrlFailed: Could not open URL in browser.
errors.pathOutsideDataDir: Path is outside the data directory.
errors.propNotLinked: This prop is not linked to the current story.
errors.rateLimitHint: Wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.reselectGrokAgentHint: The app key may need agent permissions. Re-select Grok to refresh access.
errors.reselectGrokHint: Re-select Grok in Settings so the app can issue a new gateway key.
errors.sceneDescriptionRequired: Scene profile is missing a description.
errors.sceneNotLinked: This scene is not linked to the current story.
errors.sceneNumberInvalid: Scene number must be an integer ≥ 1.
errors.seedanceNoTaskId: Seedance create response missing task id.
errors.seedanceNoVideoUrl: Seedance succeeded but no video URL in response.
errors.soulFileMustBeMd: Selected file must be a .md soul file.
errors.soulHubListFailed: SoulMD Hub list request was unsuccessful.
errors.sourceSceneNoGallery: Source scene has no gallery images.
errors.storyAndEntryRequired: storyId and entryId are required for a timeline clip.
errors.storyIdRequired: A story is required for this action.
errors.strictSamplingHint: App omits temperature for Grok; update the app or disable strictSampling in Gateway Admin → API features.
errors.timelineTimesInvalid: startTime and endTime must be finite numbers.
errors.titleTooLong: Title must be at most 200 characters.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait and retry.
errors.videoApiEmptyBody: Video API returned an empty body.
errors.videoApiMissingJobId: Video API response missing job id.
errors.videoFeatureOff: Video API is disabled on the gateway.
errors.videoFeatureOffHint: Enable videoApi in Gateway Admin → API features.
errors.videoJobFailedHint: Open Gateway logs and retry this clip.
errors.videoKeyMode: Video API key mode not allowed.
errors.videoKeyModeHint: Use an agent-mode or admin API key for video.
errors.videoRateLimitHint: Wait and retry; lower videoConcurrency if needed.
errors.videoTimeoutHint: Increase videoTimeoutSec or check the Gateway job queue.
errors.videoUnauthorizedHint: Check the API key in Settings.
errors.videoUnavailable: Video generation is unavailable. Enable Gateway videoApi and use an agent/admin key.
errors.visionImageUnreadable: Reference image could not be read.
errors.visionImageUnreadableDetail: The external or gallery still is missing or unreadable. Re-import the image, then try AI fill again.

onboarding.body: Welcome to InstantDrama Magician. Create a story, build cast assets, generate clips on the timeline, then export your film.
onboarding.progressNote: The MVP scaffold is usable; full commercial film quality is still in progress.

export.dialogHint: Choose options for this export. Your last choices are remembered next time — they are not in Settings.

videoPrep.title: Video prep: still + professional prompt
videoPrep.hint: Review the keyframe and director prompt, then generate video. You can re-gen the still or edit the prompt.
videoPrep.professionalPromptHint: Written by the LLM from dossier data; you can edit it.
videoPrep.userExtraHint: Merged with the professional prompt when generating video.
videoPrep.userExtraPh: e.g. slower camera, darker light, waist-up only…
videoPrep.regenAskHint: Describe how the still should change; we revise the prompt and re-generate.
videoPrep.regenPlaceholder: e.g. darker background, clearer fabric detail, softer expression…
videoPrep.stillOk: Still ready — review the prompt, then confirm video.
videoPrep.videoOk: Video ready. Press “Play intro video” to watch.
videoPrep.queueDone: All timeline clips have been processed.
videoPrep.timelineBatchHint: Every timeline cell uses the still → professional prompt → confirm flow (no silent auto video). Full generate runs prep steps first, then one popup per clip. You can cancel or skip a cell.
videoPrep.draftSaved: Draft saved. The intro-video button on that still becomes “Continue video”.
videoPrep.abandonConfirm: Abandon this video prep? Unsaved prompt edits will be lost.
videoPrep.lockedHint: Processing — please wait. You cannot leave this dialog until it finishes.
videoPrep.emergencyExitConfirm: Leave now? In-progress generation will stop. You can start again later.
videoPrep.emergencyExitDone: Left video prep. You can start again anytime.
videoPrep.stillReused: Reused existing keyframe still — review and generate video.
videoPrep.continuityTextOnly: Text continuity only (no prior still yet)
videoPrep.hintContinuity: Beat N’s keyframe still is used as the image ref for beat N+1 so faces and locations stay continuous. Generate clips in order; don’t skip middle cells.

menu.needActiveStory: Select or create a story before exporting a story backup.

web.authHint: Sign in to the self-hosted web UI with a bearer token.
web.authHintDetail: Use the same value as the server environment variable IDM_AUTH_TOKEN (or the token shown in the desktop app Settings → Web server).
web.authFail: Invalid token, or the server refused the connection.

backup.fullHint: Use when moving machines or making a full backup. Includes the database, media library, settings, and activity log (API keys redacted by default).
backup.importFullConfirm: This replaces the local database, media library, and settings, then restarts the app. Export a full backup first if you need to keep the current data.
backup.storyVsFull: “Export this story” on the Stories page is single-story only — it does not include the global character/scene library or settings.
backup.importFullReload: The page will reload to apply the restored database.

legal.acceptCheckbox: I have carefully read and agree to the Disclaimer and the Acceptable Use Policy in full
legal.declineHint: You must agree to both documents before using InstantDrama Magician. If you do not agree, please exit the application.
legal.outdatedAccept: Outdated — please accept the latest documents
legal.notYetAccepted: You have not accepted the current document version
legal.scrollHint: Please read every section of both documents carefully, then tick the box to continue. Agreement is a condition of use.
legal.viewInSettingsHint: Re-read the Disclaimer and Acceptable Use Policy at any time. Updates may require renewed acceptance.
legal.translationNote: If your language is incomplete, English text may appear for some sections. The English and Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong) versions are the primary drafting languages.
legal.introNote: These documents protect you and the provider. They limit warranties and liability, allocate risk for AI and third-party services, and set mandatory rules for lawful use. They are product terms of use, not personalised legal advice.

disclaimer.s1Body:
InstantDrama Magician (「瞬劇魔法師」) is software for drafting short-drama scripts, managing creative libraries (characters, costumes, scenes, props), preparing storyboards, calling third-party AI services you configure, and assembling media with FFmpeg. It may run as a desktop application and, if you enable it, as a self-hosted web server for browser control.

Unless a separate written contract says otherwise, these notices apply between you (the user) and YSK Limited and its contributors (together, the 「Provider」). Features, models, and integrations may change without notice. The software is a creative assistance tool only—not a professional production house, law firm, rights-clearance service, broadcaster, or cloud content host for your projects by default.
disclaimer.s2Body:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the software and all related documentation, samples, demos, updates, and outputs are provided 「AS IS」 and 「AS AVAILABLE」, without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, statutory, or otherwise—including but not limited to merchantability, satisfactory quality, fitness for a particular purpose, title, quiet enjoyment, non-infringement, accuracy, completeness, reliability, security, uninterrupted operation, or error-free results.

The Provider does not warrant that: (a) the software will meet your requirements; (b) AI or automated results will be correct, original, safe, lawful to publish, or commercially usable; (c) defects will be corrected; or (d) servers, gateways, or third-party APIs will remain available or compatible.
disclaimer.s3Body:
Text, images, video, audio, subtitles, prompts, and other materials may be produced or transformed by machine-learning systems (for example local Grok-compatible gateways, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, Kimi/Moonshot, Seedance/Seedream, or other providers you select).

Such content may be inaccurate, incomplete, biased, offensive, repetitive, fabricated, outdated, or similar to existing works. It may fail platform safety filters or later be judged infringing or unlawful. You alone must review, edit, fact-check, rights-clear, and decide whether to use, publish, monetise, or discard any output. Do not rely on the software as the sole source of truth for medical, legal, financial, safety-critical, or other high-stakes decisions.
disclaimer.s4Title: 4. Third-party services, API keys, and your accounts
disclaimer.s4Body:
You supply, store, and control your own API keys, base URLs, credentials, and vendor accounts. Fees, billing errors, rate limits, content moderation, model deprecations, outages, data processing, export controls, and account suspension are governed solely by those third parties’ terms and policies.

The Provider is not a party to your contracts with AI, cloud, payment, or identity vendors; is not your agent toward them; and is not liable for their charges, refusals, delays, data breaches on their systems, or changes to their APIs. You authorise the software only to transmit requests you initiate using credentials you configure.
disclaimer.s5Title: 5. Your content, local data, backups, and self-hosting
disclaimer.s5Body:
By default, projects, media files, settings, activity logs, and caches are stored on your device or on infrastructure you control when using self-host / embedded web-server mode. The Provider does not operate a mandatory multi-tenant cloud account for your story libraries unless you separately subscribe to such a service under other terms.

You are solely responsible for: encryption and access control; backups and disaster recovery; disk failure and ransomware; who can reach any web server you enable; and compliance with privacy laws for any personal data you process. Lost, corrupted, leaked, or inaccessible data is at your risk, except where mandatory consumer law requires otherwise.
disclaimer.s6Title: 6. Intellectual property of the software vs your outputs
disclaimer.s6Body:
Subject to open-source licences applicable to distributed code, the Provider and its licensors retain all right, title, and interest in the software’s branding, UI, non-open-source code (if any), and documentation. These documents do not sell you ownership of third-party model weights, provider trademarks, or FFmpeg/other dependencies.

Between you and the Provider, and subject to third-party model licences and the rights of others, you retain whatever rights you lawfully hold in content you create. The Provider does not claim ownership of your scripts or media merely because you used the tool. Clearance of music, stock, fonts, trademarks, and talent likeness remains your duty.
disclaimer.s7Body: The application depends on third-party libraries and binaries (including FFmpeg, Electron, Node packages, and others listed in the project). Those components remain under their own licences and notices. Nothing here reduces rights or obligations you have under open-source licences that apply to distributed code. Failures or security issues in third-party components are outside the Provider’s control to the extent permitted by law.
disclaimer.s8Body: No software is perfectly secure. The Provider does not warrant that the application, web server, local database, or communications will be free of vulnerabilities, interception, or unauthorised access. You must keep systems patched, protect tokens and API keys, use HTTPS reverse proxies on public networks, and apply least-privilege access. Report suspected vulnerabilities responsibly; do not exploit them.
disclaimer.s9Body:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Provider, its affiliates, directors, employees, agents, and contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, punitive, exemplary, or multiple damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, goodwill, business opportunity, or anticipated savings, arising out of or related to the software or these documents—whether in contract, tort (including negligence), strict liability, or otherwise—even if advised of the possibility of such damages.

Where liability cannot be fully excluded, the Provider’s aggregate liability for all claims arising out of the software or these documents is limited to the greater of: (a) the total fees (if any) you paid the Provider for the software in the twelve (12) months before the claim; or (b) zero if the software was provided free of charge. Multiple claims do not enlarge this cap.
disclaimer.s10Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, you agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the Provider and its affiliates, officers, employees, and agents from and against any claims, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your content, projects, exports, or publications; (b) your breach of these documents or of law; (c) your infringement or alleged infringement of third-party rights; (d) your misuse of AI providers or disclosure of credentials; or (e) your operation of a web server or exposure of the application on a network.
disclaimer.s11Body: Features may be experimental, incomplete, or disabled. Pipelines, prompts, default models, and UI labels may change. Demo stories and sample assets are illustrative only. The Provider may modify, suspend, or discontinue features without liability, except where mandatory law requires notice or remedies.
disclaimer.s12Body:
Subject to mandatory laws that cannot be waived, these documents are intended to be interpreted under the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, without regard to conflict-of-law rules that would apply another jurisdiction’s law.

If you are a consumer, nothing here limits non-excludable rights under the law of your place of residence. If any provision is held unenforceable, it will be modified to the minimum extent necessary, and the remainder remains in effect. Failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver. These documents (together with any open-source licences and any separate written agreement with the Provider) constitute the entire agreement on their subject matter and supersede prior inconsistent statements regarding warranty and liability for the software, except for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation.

terms.s1Body: By installing, opening, enabling the web server, or otherwise using InstantDrama Magician, you represent that you have legal capacity to agree to these terms (or that a parent/guardian agrees on your behalf where required). If you use the software on behalf of an organisation, you represent that you have authority to bind that organisation. If you do not agree, you must not use the software.
terms.s2Body: You may use the software only for purposes that are legal in every jurisdiction where you operate and where content is stored, processed, or published. You must not use the software to commit crimes, violate court orders, evade sanctions or export controls, facilitate fraud, or interfere with investigations. You are responsible for obtaining any permits, licences, or platform approvals required for your productions.
terms.s4Title: 4. Rights, likeness, music, and third-party IP
terms.s4Body:
You warrant that you own or have all licences, releases, and permissions needed for scripts, reference images, audio, logos, trademarks, fonts, brand assets, and personal likenesses you import or use as generation references.

You must not use the software to infringe copyrights, trademarks, design rights, trade secrets, database rights, or personality/publicity rights. Clearing music, stock libraries, celebrity likenesses, and location releases for any export or publication is solely your obligation. You will not remove or obscure third-party rights notices embedded in assets you do not own.
terms.s5Body: When you call external AI or media providers, you must also comply with their acceptable-use, safety, and commercial terms. You must not deliberately jailbreak, flood, scrape in violation of terms, or otherwise abuse those services. You must not misrepresent the software as officially endorsed by those providers unless you have a separate agreement with them.
terms.s6Title: 6. Security, credentials, and web server mode
terms.s6Body:
You must protect API keys, login tokens, and database files. If you enable the embedded or standalone web server, you must: use a strong token; not share it publicly; prefer HTTPS reverse proxies on untrusted networks; restrict bind addresses where appropriate; and not expose unauthenticated administrative control to the public internet.

You must not attack, scan, overload, or reverse-engineer systems you do not own or lack authorisation to test, including this application’s endpoints on shared machines. You must not attempt to bypass technical protections in the software except as allowed by mandatory law (e.g. certain interoperability rights).
terms.s7Title: 7. Privacy and personal data you process
terms.s7Body: If your projects include personal data (names, faces, voices, identity documents, etc.), you are the controller/processor under applicable privacy laws for that data. You must have a lawful basis, provide notices where required, and not use the software to unlawfully surveil, dox, or profile individuals. The Provider is not your privacy counsel.
terms.s8Title: 8. Commercial use of outputs; no sponsorship
terms.s8Body:
Subject to third-party model licences, open-source terms, and the rights of others, you may use content you lawfully create with the software for commercial projects. The Provider does not transfer ownership of third-party models or brands to you.

App stores, social networks, broadcasters, and advertisers have their own rules—you must comply. Use of the software does not imply endorsement by YSK Limited or any AI vendor of your content.
terms.s9Title: 9. Fair use of the software and updates
terms.s9Body: You must not redistribute cracked builds, remove licence or attribution notices required by open-source components, or use the software in a way that harms the Provider’s infrastructure or reputation through unlawful abuse. Update channels (if any) may be rate-limited or discontinued. Self-hosted deployments are your operational responsibility.
terms.s10Body: If you breach these rules or the Disclaimer, the Provider may refuse support, decline update assistance, require you to stop using distributed builds, or pursue remedies available at law. For self-hosted copies, you remain responsible for how you run the software. The Provider may investigate credible reports of abuse where legally permitted.
terms.s11Body: You must not use or export the software in violation of applicable export control or sanctions laws. You are responsible for determining whether your use of foreign AI APIs is permitted in your region.
terms.s12Body:
The Provider may update the Disclaimer and Acceptable Use Policy. When the in-app document version changes, you may be required to accept the new version before continuing. Continued use after acceptance constitutes agreement to the version shown at that time.

Sections on liability, indemnity, IP, and governing law survive termination of your use. These terms do not create a partnership, employment, or agency relationship. You may not assign these terms without the Provider’s consent; the Provider may assign to an affiliate or successor. Contact for legal notices, if required, should be directed through the project’s published support or company channels for YSK Limited.

creator.title: Creator
creator.name: Ki (yanshekki)
creator.bio: Full-stack developer, quant trader, founder of YSK Limited.
creator.supportBlurb: If InstantDrama Magician helps your short-drama production workflow, consider buying me a coffee!

actions.title: Actions
actions.subtitle: Motion direction library — actor blocking, prop paths, staging, and demo clips
actions.name: Name
actions.castRefsHint: Pull stills from Characters, Costumes, Scenes, or Props to ground the instruction board.
actions.castRefsEmpty: No references yet. Add stills from other libraries.
actions.noStills: This item has no stills yet
actions.empty: No action guides yet. Create one to plan body motion and staging.
actions.aiFillHint: Describe the motion idea, or leave blank with a reference still — AI fills tempo, intention, and camera notes.
actions.aiIdeaPh: e.g. hero draws sword in rain, three-beat turn…
actions.aiFillOk: AI filled the action. Review, then save.
actions.confirmDelete: Delete action “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
actions.refsHint: References feed multi-panel generation and demo video identity locks.
actions.introVideoOk: Demo clip ready. Use Play to watch.
actions.plateHintShort: Pick panel count and art style, then generate the multi-panel instruction board. Panel 1 is the first action beat.
